author: Kinzy Dwag
review: I love Palmpay, their transaction is always smooth and fast. But I have 2 issues. 1) I noticed I don't receive notifications anymore since I updated the app about a week ago. 2) I always have issue with subscribing start time pay TV. Sometimes the transaction will be successful but I won't be able to view. When it first happened last year, I was refunded after 24hrs, it happens 2days ago again and I didn't get any refund and my TV didn't show as well.

author: Brimoh Emmanuel
review: I’ve been using PalmPay for a while now and it’s very reliable for daily transactions. Transfers are fast, charges are low, and I like the cashback on airtime and data. The app is also easy to use. However, customer support can be slow sometimes, and I won’t advise keeping very large amounts there. Overall, it’s a good app for everyday payments and quick transactions.

author: wallar wallar
review: You have the most useless customer care of all time. why is it so difficult to report web card scam and insurance policy that I did not subscribe to deducting money from my account on monthly basis. if I turn it off, it will automatically turn on. why can't I have control over my account in the app. No avenue to report the issue in app. rubbish

author: udoh Mike
review: I think this is one among the reason why some people don't like to payback there loan. Imagine, the app saids daily interest rate is 0.9, but after attempting to collect a loan of 12k, the daily interest rate skyrocket to 1.40 immediately. that's too bad and interest rate on the high side. developer should carefully look into this matter.

author: Helen Bakare
review: Your banking app is okay, but your flexi loan officers are rude, condescending, and they always threaten to tarnish image and defame even right on the day the loan is due, not on the day after. They call to harass and threaten on the very day it is due. Please, work on extending your flexi loan. They keep harassing even if it's a few hours late. This is uncalled for .

author: Christopher Ayara
review: Palmplay has served since 2020 and I was satisfied with the output from the developers. I have an issue ( have been texting manual representative for months now and yet my account hasn't been unfrozen) I keep getting messages like click on icon to unfreeze but I updated the app and there's nothing there to edit so I ask if the developers are different from the people who froze my account for I didn't steal. Help!

author: Loveth
review: I would even give it 0 stars if u know you are going to purchase cards virtual or physical just know that if you have any issue no one is there for you to call. i had an issue recently of over N70,000 which was pending in one of my online payment. ive been trying to reach out to customer care but it was at that moment i realised how useless i was to have put my money in this bank. i called customer service and all i could end up with after burning N200 card was there is no agent available.

author: akinola mary
review: For a mobile banking app, issues involving repeated or unauthorized billing should be handled quickly and professionally. Unfortunately, this has not been the case. A financial platform is expected to provide users with confidence, transparency, and reliable customer service, especially when money-related concerns arise. Based on my experience, the app has failed to meet those expectations....Download at your own risk!!!

author: YUSUF M. YAHAYA
review: Complaint resolution is terrible. To undo a restriction on my account, I had to call six times, and each agent had a completely different opinion on the same issue - obvious knowledge gap among agents. All requirements to prove account ownership and transaction legitimacy sent via email, as requested, but still no solution. The same issues with the conventional banks I was trying to avoid - poor customer service - is what I seemingly ran into with Palmpay.

author: Ejue Godgift Wubong (Expensive)
review: PalmPay is indeed a nice digital banking app that offers users great incentives and discounts, making it easier for people to save; however, I was so disappointed with my experience upon purchasing data for the first time. 😞 It kept showing processing until the next day by noon; my money was refunded, and I had to applaud Opay in this aspect. Also, if they could make the app remember the numbers you've purchased data for before, it would be helpful; you wouldn't have to type the number manually

author: Sammy Sunday
review: good day. I have been using pailmpay for years now and i can tell the app have been wonderful. until recently I have been experiencing something I dont really understand. earlier this week this started. to log in into my palmpay app as been a problem . at first I notice I'd thought it my network . but then other apps are working very fine. as time good by it eventually comes back to normal . as at this very moment I'm texting the review, my palmpay app as refuse to open. and I dont like this.

author: Terwase Samson
review: PALMPAY is an incredible mobile wallet app that's super easy to use. It's secure, so you can trust your transactions are safe. You can send money, pay bills, recharge your phone, and even set savings goals. It also has features like expense tracking, and the ability to apply for loans. It's seriously a game-changer! Overall, I highly recommend Palmpay for anyone looking for a convenient and reliable comprehensive mobile wallet. Give it a try and see how it can transform your financial journey!

author: Apochi Peter Uroko
review: The customer support response is very poor, The bank seems to even support scammers to the detriment of her customers, They will freeze your money without any notifications and reason for doing so, when you contact customer support or send mail they will not respond even after two weeks. Apart from the zero transfer the bank operation is awkward.

author: Justin David
review: This app is very interesting to use. After being a customer for over five years, I would say that I was disappointed be the removal of the premium customer tag. No one has been able to give a vivid explanation why it was stopped. For this reason I am bringing down my rating totwo stars

author: Ifechukwu Meshach
review: PALMPAY, your customer service is terrible. transaction that I did over 7 months ago has not reached the receiver. I've complained and complained again and again. they will say has been escalated for resolution but it will still not be resolved.

author: Ola Michael
review: If there's anything more than 5 stars that I can give, I'd gladly give😁. Palmpay is the best finance app that I have ever used. I gladly recommend it to everyone that want to transfer money endlessly to any bank without limits.

author: Chioma Chidobu
review: Palmpay is currently my main bank account where I put 95% of all the money I have in this world. But I'm thinking that's probably poor planning on my end because in the last 2 days I've realized that you guys have the worst customer service. This is very bad for a brand I've trusted with my money for years now. I've never had to contact support until yesterday when I needed to ask a simple question to understand how I can ensure the money I withdraw from my SmartEarn wallet can be deducted from

author: Akinbowale Elijah
review: The latest update glitches a lot. On my device When opening the loan interface, the safebox interface and trying the collect trial cash, the app restarts. But before this, it was absolutely perfect. Pls help us work on this.

author: Solotez Akwa
review: palmpay was my best app before have been using it for a long time have never had a complain, but currently now I regret banking with them because they allowed & sharing link on the app,my money just dey lost everytime, anytime I login I will just see how them use policies finished my money, I regret banking with them now and I will deactivate my account from them and delete the app from my phone.

author: celestine abuh
review: Great and an efficient bank service .I recommend for all to patronize. I will suggest if the dispute can carry an option "wrong deposit to other banks" The app is easy to operate.

author: Ileri Oluwa
review: palmpay is a chill app. but tbh you guys need to chill with the loans cause why will you be threatening a customer cause they are 2 days late! omooo first, the time limit is short. Second, it's not even up to a week for the loan due you're already threatening your customer it doesn't make sense fr.

author: Marvelous John
review: Any time I want to login into my account After putting the password I created it with The will always say incorrect password 🤦 i will try again same thing They then locked the login section saying i should try again in the next 2hrs Dats very annoying

author: Peace King
review: I've spent an hour and a half chatting endlessly with supposed customer care and still haven't gotten any help. Just the same question being repeated over and over again like a bunch of bots

author: Olaniyi Aremu
review: Since I've not saved much, it barely yielded as I planted. I will comment more when I put in more cash as it were. Expectation is very high that things will be better very soon.

author: Ishaq Mato
review: This is so awful I sent Money💰to an opay account two to three days back and the money was not received by the owner and it shows me that the transaction was successful. OMG I was shocked to hear that the money was not received. Palm pay "you disappointed me🥺" and this is the reason I hate the bank for now pls 🙁 send this money back to the owner🤏🙁

author: Olaide Xchange
review: This app is good, but ever since you have partner with those mad people flexi loan app they have been destroying your business with the customer. the way they do address customer with a curse message all because of 2 days overdue loan isn't normal at all. Make them give themselves brain ooo, if they don't want to let their family mourn over them.

author: George Gloria
review: I was supposed to repay my loan today for an increment, which I repaid and tried applying again and I was asked to try again after 15 days, wat could be the problem!

author: Logic Pastor
review: I had to edit this review after you had made some amendments. But you people are still making your customers to run into debts. the solution is to remove auto-topup. you people intentionally put it where the done button is so that people will unknowingly activate the auto-topup service after recharging airtime or data. then the following week , you'll start debiting people without their consent all in the name of auto-topup. deactivate this service. we have had enough debt already.

author: Hammed mariam Opeyemi
review: My best favorite app for transfer with zero charge at every time I'm really enjoying your app you guys are so great and I'm giving a 5star, keep up the good work

author: James Uweneija
review: All other banks should not bother coming to work. with palmpay banking is stress-free. no network failure or debit without payment. PalmPay you rule the banking world! PalmPay you are costumer's friendly!! PalmPay transactions are successful every seconds!!!

author: Promise Simon
review: PalmPay loan is too high for used, but they are fast in giving out loan. The issue is that they charge more higher..!

author: LEOMARK ONYEBUCHI
review: Cool features and experience. What I dislike in PALMPAY is the inability to input NOTES for transactions between PALMPAY to PALMPAY. While sending money to other bank's one can input NOTES (for the transaction) whereas PALMPAY to PALMPAY it's not possible. This affects me as I do notes transactions to aid remembrance.

author: Nicky Abbah
review: very very easy to use even when you are in need of some amount from your saved money dey just give it back to you immediately I love the way they operate

author: Stephanie
review: "MARK TONIGHT AS THE START OF AGONY&SORROW AS TRAGEDY,CALAMITY,MISFORTUNE,DEATHS,HAVOC WILL NOT STOP IN UR LIFE&GENERATIONS EXCEPT YOU PAY THIS LOAN TODAY." Message received from the loan app, some ppl don't get to pay back on time cause they don't have the money The threats are so irrelevant, after paying back I'd uninstall the app. Cause what is this....

author: Okez Jimz
review: palmpay has been an interesting banking app... so far so good I have been enjoying banking with and with the interest popping that's a good deal.

author: Chinonso Ugwoha
review: I don't know what is going on with palmpay, for more than 1 month I've been trying to verify my NIN in order to upgrade my tier level so I can increase my balance and do some investment, but it has been rejecting it that my NINis not correct, but I know it is correct. Just last night I was able to upgrade my tier with the same NIN on both fair money & Wayabank with no issue. I have reached out to your customer service both online & physical office in Yaba but they can't resolve it. should I move

author: Alawode Anuoluwapo
review: A good app but they have to do better with their loan. Too much of interest and repayment at short period of time 🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️. And I also don't know y am always being credited with card without my consent

author: Mia Blosson
review: I love the app so much for it free transfer fee, discount airtime and data rewards daily and token for signing up😌 But was tough when bought some stuff and I want to pay with transfer my money hanged and it was refunded the next day

author: Otomba Ufot
review: In terms of banking services, they are good. But their loan services is the worst I've ever seen. Just have a challenge and default on the loan, they will call all the contacts on your phone, causing you huge embarrassment not minding your credit history with them. And they cannot savage the situation of saving your name by resending messages to those same contacts they reached out to to say you've cleared up your loan. Very unprofessional & stupid move. you can't experience this with Fairmoney.

author: Ganiyu Aminat
review: I love this app because it doesn't take too long to load, even if I have little or less data. The data. and recharge fees there are also affordable. However, I think the Tier 2 benefits should be upgraded a bit, it's too low. more or less the same as Tier 1.
